title: Python Fundamentals
description: Core syntax, data types, functions, and debugging habits.

lessons.title: Variables, expressions, and functions
lessons.content_md:
You will practice writing small pure functions and validating them with tests.

Focus on:
- expressions vs statements
- function inputs/outputs
- deterministic behavior

exercises.title: Write add_two(x)
exercises.prompt_md:
Implement a function `add_two(x)` that returns `x + 2`.

Requirements:
- must work for ints and floats
- do not print

exercises.title: FizzBuzz list
exercises.prompt_md:
Write a function `fizzbuzz(n)` that returns a list of strings for 1..n:
- multiples of 3 => "Fizz"
- multiples of 5 => "Buzz"
- multiples of both => "FizzBuzz"
- otherwise the number
